conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to pick an ORM for the new Node.js service. I'm looking at Prisma, TypeORM, and Drizzle.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: TypeORM has been around forever but the codebase feels unmaintained and there are a lot of open issues.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Prisma has the best DX and type safety, but the query engine is a separate binary which adds deployment complexity.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Drizzle is lightweight, SQL-first, and has no binary dependency.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Given that we deploy to edge environments where bundling a Prisma binary is problematic, I'll go with Drizzle.

query: Which ORM did the user decide to use for the Node.js service?
